name: gcd-kernel-sites
description: Autonomous domain sites powered by the GCD Headless Contract Gateway

scripts.generate: cd .. && python -m umcp.hcg.builder --all --output web/src/content && cd web
scripts.generate:domain: cd .. && python -m umcp.hcg.builder --output web/src/content && cd web
scripts.full-build: npm run generate && npm run build
